author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone 

Two new ships are coming to the Galactic Marketplace this week, and you brave space explorers get to decide which ones! 

Vote in the pols below to decide which spacecraft you'd like to soar through the galaxy in 

  for Calico Medtech
  for Ogrika Tursic
  for Opal Bitboat
  for Pearce R6
